'''Hanofar''' was a terrestrial<ref name="RES" /> [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="CSWE" /> located in the [[Hanofar system/Legends|Hanofar system]], a part of the [[Southern Core]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="EAOC" /> During the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a conflict fought between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]],<ref name="RES" /> Hanofar was held by the Empire.<ref name="CSWE" />

At some point during that [[Time/Legends|time]], a rebel group on Hanofar engaged in protests against Imperial taxation. The protests grew violent, leading to<ref name="RES" /> skirmishes with [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial forces]]<ref name="CSWE" /> and several innocent bystanders getting injured. Among the hurt was the [[Vess Kogo's mother|mother]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Vess Kogo]].<ref name="RES" />

==Behind the scenes==
Hanofar was first mentioned in the ''[[Rebellion Era Sourcebook]]'', a [[2001]] [[Wizards of the Coast]] supplement for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="RES" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Hanofar [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the world Hanofar, within grid square L-13.<ref name="TEA" />
